latin: Post caedem, socius in vehiculo sedens tranquille dixit: 'sclopetum relinque. crustula autem sume.'

questions.prompt: What two instructions does the man give?
questions.target: Leave the gun, take the pastries
choices: Hide the body, clean the car
Leave the gun, take the pastries
Burn the evidence, call the boss

questions.prompt: What is the tone of the speaker?

translation: After the murder, the associate sitting in the car calmly said: 'Leave the gun. But take the pastries.'
